name: localbridge-mcp
description: MCP adapter layer for LocalBridge, exposing X/Twitter capabilities via MCP tools.

scripts.test:e2e:tools-list: npm run build && npm run typecheck:tests && tsx tests/mcp-tools-list.e2e.ts
scripts.test:e2e:list-x-instances: npm run build && npm run typecheck:tests && tsx tests/mcp-list-x-instances.e2e.ts
scripts.test:e2e:list-x-instances:unavailable: npm run build && npm run typecheck:tests && tsx tests/mcp-list-x-instances-unavailable.e2e.ts
scripts.test:e2e:list-x-instances:timeout: npm run build && npm run typecheck:tests && tsx tests/mcp-list-x-instances-timeout.e2e.ts
scripts.test:e2e:get-x-status: npm run build && npm run typecheck:tests && tsx tests/mcp-get-x-status.e2e.ts
scripts.test:e2e:get-x-basic-info: npm run build && npm run typecheck:tests && tsx tests/mcp-get-x-basic-info.e2e.ts
scripts.test:e2e:get-home-timeline: npm run build && npm run typecheck:tests && tsx tests/mcp-get-home-timeline.e2e.ts
scripts.test:e2e:get-tweet: npm run build && npm run typecheck:tests && tsx tests/mcp-get-tweet.e2e.ts
scripts.test:e2e:get-tweet-replies: npm run build && npm run typecheck:tests && tsx tests/mcp-get-tweet-replies.e2e.ts
scripts.test:e2e:get-user-profile: npm run build && npm run typecheck:tests && tsx tests/mcp-get-user-profile.e2e.ts
scripts.test:e2e:real-localbridge-smoke: npm run build && npm run typecheck:tests && tsx tests/mcp-real-localbridge-smoke.e2e.ts
